message.content:
You are a senior code reviewer. Review the implementation of MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx

Context:
- This is a migration from card-place project to this project
- The view.tsx follows Hook Component pattern (pure render component)
- It receives props from the hook in index.tsx
- It uses @semparar/design-system-app components

Review for:
1. Proper component structure and patterns
2. Correct import paths for this project
3. Type safety and TypeScript usage
4. Any potential bugs or issues
5. Adherence to Hook Component pattern (no logic in view)

Read the file and provide a detailed review with any issues found.

content.content:
1→import {
     2→  Alert,
     3→  BackDropBottom,
     4→  Box,
     5→  Button,
     6→  CardActivity,
     7→  DetailTransactionValue,
     8→  SeparatorHorizontal,
     9→  TagLabel,
    10→  Text,
    11→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12→import type { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
    13→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    14→import { ActivityIndicator, Linking } from 'react-native';
    15→import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
    16→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
    17→import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
    18→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    19→import type { MyOrdersDetailProps } from './Models';
    20→import { STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
    21→
    22→const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
    23→  handleGoBack,
    24→  transaction,
    25→  modalizeRef,
    26→  modalizeRefInfo,
    27→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    28→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    29→  handleCloseInfo,
    30→  isLoading,
    31→  hasError,
    32→  handleRetry,
    33→  isCashback,
    34→  cardTitle,
    35→  formattedPointsValue,
    36→  highlightText,
    37→  formattedCurrencyValue,
    38→  marketplaceContent,
    39→  showOrderNumber,
    40→  showStatus,
    41→  showValue,
    42→  height,
    43→}) => {
    44→  if (hasError) {
    45→    return (
    46→      <BasicScreen
    47→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    48→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    49→        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    50→      >
    51→        <ApiError
    52→          title="Algo deu errado!"
    53→          subTitle="Por favor, tente de novo."
    54→          isLoading={isLoading}
    55→          onPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    56→        />
    57→      </BasicScreen>
    58→    );
    59→  }
    60→
    61→  if (isLoading && !transaction) {
    62→    return (
    63→      <BasicScreen
    64→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    65→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    66→        hasScroll
    67→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    68→      >
    69→        <Box flex={1} justify="center" align="center" minHeight={400}>
    70→          <ActivityIndicator size="large" color={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01} />
    71→        </Box>
    72→      </BasicScreen>
    73→    );
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  if (!transaction) {
    77→    return null;
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  const renderDivider = () => (
    81→    <SeparatorHorizontal
    82→      borderWidth="smaller"
    83→      borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    84→      height={1}
    85→      width="100%"
    86→      mt="xxxxs"
    87→    />
    88→  );
    89→
    90→  const renderMarketplaceContent = () => {
    91→    if (!marketplaceContent) return null;
    92→
    93→    return (
    94→      <>
    95→        <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    96→          Número do pedido
    97→        </Text>
    98→        <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    99→          #{marketplaceContent.orderNumber}
   100→        </Text>
   101→        {marketplaceContent.status && (
   102→          <>
   103→            {renderDivider()}
   104→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   105→              Status do pedido
   106→            </Text>
   107→            <TagLabel
   108→              type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never) || 'neutral'}
   109→              text={marketplaceContent.status}
   110→              showSpacing
   111→            />
   112→          </>
   113→        )}
   114→        {marketplaceContent.paymentType && (
   115→          <>
   116→            {renderDivider()}
   117→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   118→              Forma de pagamento
   119→            </Text>
   120→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   121→              {marketplaceContent.paymentType}
   122→            </Text>
   123→          </>
   124→        )}
   125→        {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== undefined &&
   126→          marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== null && (
   127→            <>
   128→              {renderDivider()}
   129→              <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   130→                Frete
   131→              </Text>
   132→              <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   133→                {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints}
   134→              </Text>
   135→            </>
   136→          )}
   137→        {marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== undefined &&
   138→          marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== null && (
   139→            <>
   140→              {renderDivider()}
   141→              <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   142→                Valor total
   143→              </Text>
   144→              <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   145→                {marketplaceContent.valuePoints}
   146→              </Text>
   147→            </>
   148→          )}
   149→        {marketplaceContent.vendorName && (
   150→          <>
   151→            {renderDivider()}
   152→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   153→              Parceiro: {marketplaceContent.vendorName}
   154→            </Text>
   155→          </>
   156→        )}
   157→        {marketplaceContent.items.map((item, itemIndex: number) => (
   158→          <CardActivity
   159→            key={itemIndex}
   160→            mt="nano"
   161→            title={item.name}
   162→            titleTextType="paragraphMD"
   163→            description={`Quantidade: ${item.quantity}\nValor: ${item.valuePoints}`}
   164→            descriptionTextType="paragraphSM"
   165→            showImage={!!item.cleanedImageUrl}
   166→            image={item.cleanedImageUrl ? { uri: item.cleanedImageUrl } : undefined}
   167→            showIcon={false}
   168→            iconRight={null as never}
   169→            hideBorder={false}
   170→          />
   171→        ))}
   172→
   173→        <Alert
   174→          title="Detalhes da entrega"
   175→          mt="meddium"
   176→          label="Você pode acompanhar a entrega do seu pedido pelo site do parceiro."
   177→          numberOfLines={2}
   178→          type="highlight"
   179→          icon="icon-truck"
   180→          hasIconBackground
   181→          bgIconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   182→        />
   183→      </>
   184→    );
   185→  };
   186→
   187→  return (
   188→    <>
   189→      <BasicScreen
   190→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
   191→        isLoading={isLoading}
   192→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   193→        rightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace ? 'icon-help' : undefined}
   194→        rightIconOnPress={undefined}
   195→        hasRightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace}
   196→        hasScroll
   197→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
   198→      >
   199→        <DetailTransactionValue
   200→          icon={transaction.icon as never}
   201→          title={cardTitle}
   202→          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   203→          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   204→          points={formattedPointsValue}
   205→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   206→          pointsColor={
   207→            transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED'
   208→              ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02'
   209→              : ('INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const)
   210→          }
   211→        />
   212→
   213→        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="xs" flex={1}>
   214→          <TagLabel icon={undefined} type="neutral" text={highlightText} showSpacing mb="xs" />
   215→
   216→          <Box flex={1} width="100%">
   217→            {showOrderNumber && (
   218→              <>
   219→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   220→                  Número do pedido
   221→                </Text>
   222→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   223→                  #{transaction.id}
   224→                </Text>
   225→              </>
   226→            )}
   227→
   228→            {showStatus && transaction.status && (
   229→              <>
   230→                {renderDivider()}
   231→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   232→                  Status do pedido
   233→                </Text>
   234→                <TagLabel
   235→                  type={STATUS_COLORS[transaction.status] || 'neutral'}
   236→                  text={transaction.status}
   237→                  showSpacing
   238→                />
   239→              </>
   240→            )}
   241→
   242→            {showValue && (
   243→              <>
   244→                {renderDivider()}
   245→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   246→                  Valor
   247→                </Text>
   248→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   249→                  {formattedCurrencyValue}
   250→                </Text>
   251→              </>
   252→            )}
   253→
   254→            {marketplaceContent && renderMarketplaceContent()}
   255→          </Box>
   256→
   257→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   258→            <Button type="ghostLarge" text="Relatar Problema" onPress={handleOpenReportProblem} />
   259→          </Box>
   260→        </Box>
   261→      </BasicScreen>
   262→
   263→      <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
   264→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
   265→          <Box align="center" width="100%">
   266→            <Text type="paragraphXXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xs" align="center">
   267→              Central de Atendimento
   268→            </Text>
   269→          </Box>
   270→        </Box>
   271→
   272→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   273→          <CardActivity
   274→            mt="nano"
   275→            icon="icon-contact"
   276→            title="Capitais"
   277→            description="4002 1552"
   278→            iconRight="icon-next"
   279→            showIcon
   280→            showTagLabel={false}
   281→            onPress={() => {
   282→              eventSelectContent({
   283→                content_type: 'cta',
   284→                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
   285→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   286→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   287→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   288→              });
   289→              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
   290→            }}
   291→          />
   292→
   293→          <CardActivity
   294→            mt="nano"
   295→            icon="icon-contact"
   296→            title="Demais localidades"
   297→            description="0800 015 0252"
   298→            iconRight="icon-next"
   299→            showIcon
   300→            showTagLabel={false}
   301→            onPress={() => {
   302→              eventSelectContent({
   303→                content_type: 'cta',
   304→                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
   305→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   306→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   307→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   308→              });
   309→
   310→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   311→            }}
   312→          />
   313→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxxxs">
   314→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das 9h às 17h.
   315→          </Text>
   316→        </Box>
   317→
   318→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxxxs">
   319→          <Text
   320→            type="linkMD"
   321→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   322→            onPress={handleCloseReportProblem}
   323→            align="center"
   324→          >
   325→            Fechar
   326→          </Text>
   327→        </Box>
   328→      </BackDropBottom>
   329→
   330→      {isCashback && (
   331→        <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.3} modalizeRef={modalizeRefInfo as PropsModalizeRef}>
   332→          <Text
   333→            type="paragraphMD"
   334→            align="center"
   335→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   336→            mt="small"
   337→            mb="smaller"
   338→          >
   339→            Você também pode conferir o valor do desconto nos lançamentos da sua fatura.
   340→          </Text>
   341→
   342→          <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleCloseInfo} />
   343→        </BackDropBottom>
   344→      )}
   345→    </>
   346→  );
   347→};
   348→
   349→export default MyOrdersDetailView;
   350→

<system-reminder>

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.content:
1→# Frontend Style Guide — Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2→
     3→Welcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4→This version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5→
     6→> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. ☕
     7→
     8→---
     9→
    10→## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11→
    12→- [Introduction](#introduction)
    13→- [Components & Screens — Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    14→- [Atomic Components — Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    15→- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    16→- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    17→- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    18→- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    19→- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    20→- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    21→- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    22→- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    23→- [Checklist](#checklist)
    24→
    25→---
    26→
    27→## Introduction
    28→
    29→The goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.
    30→
    31→Key decisions:
    32→
    33→- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    34→- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    35→- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    36→- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    37→
    38→---
    39→
    40→## Components & Screens — Hook Component Pattern
    41→
    42→Each screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    43→
    44→```
    45→screens/Home/
    46→├── index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    47→├── view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    48→└── Models/
    49→    └── index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    50→```
    51→
    52→**Models/index.d.ts**
    53→
    54→```ts
    55→export interface HomeParams {
    56→  welcome?: string;
    57→}
    58→export interface HomeState {
    59→  greeting: string;
    60→  isLoading: boolean;
    61→}
    62→export interface HomeHandlers {
    63→  onPressCTA: () => void;
    64→}
    65→export type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    66→```
    67→
    68→**index.ts (logic hook)**
    69→
    70→```ts
    71→import { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from 'react';
    72→import type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from './Models';
    73→import { useUserStore } from '@/services/user/store'; // Zustand slice example
    74→
    75→export function useHomeScreen(params?: HomeParams): UseHomeReturn {
    76→  const name = useUserStore(s => s.name);
    77→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
    78→
    79→  useEffect(() => {
    80→    const t = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 300);
    81→    return () => clearTimeout(t);
    82→  }, []);
    83→
    84→  const greeting = useMemo(
    85→    () => params?.welcome ?? `Hello, ${name || 'guest'}!`,
    86→    [
    87→      params?.welcome,
    88→      name,
    89→    ],
    90→  );
    91→
    92→  const onPressCTA = useCallback(() => {
    93→    // Call services, analytics, navigation, etc.
    94→  }, []);
    95→
    96→  return {
    97→    greeting,
    98→    isLoading,
    99→    onPressCTA,
   100→  };
   101→}
   102→```
   103→
   104→**view.tsx (render)**
   105→
   106→```tsx
   107→import React from 'react';
   108→import { View } from 'react-native';
   109→import { Text, Button } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
   110→import { useHomeScreen } from './index';
   111→import type { HomeParams } from './Models';
   112→
   113→type Props = HomeParams;
   114→
   115→export default function HomeScreen(props: Props) {
   116→  const { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA } = useHomeScreen(props);
   117→
   118→  if (isLoading) {
   119→    return (
   120→      <View>
   121→        <Text>Loading...</Text>
   122→      </View>
   123→    );
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  return (
   127→    <View>
   128→      <Text>{greeting}</Text>
   129→      <Button onPress={onPressCTA} text="Continue" />
   130→    </View>
   131→  );
   132→}
   133→```
   134→
   135→---
   136→
   137→## Atomic Components — Hook Component Pattern
   138→
   139→```
   140→atomic/atoms/Button/
   141→├── index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   142→├── view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   143→└── Models/
   144→    └── index.d.ts
   145→```
   146→
   147→**Models/index.d.ts**
   148→
   149→```ts
   150→export interface ButtonProps {
   151→  text: string;
   152→  disabled?: boolean;
   153→  onPress?: () => void;
   154→}
   155→export interface ButtonState {
   156→  pressed: boolean;
   157→}
   158→export interface ButtonHandlers {
   159→  handlePress: () => void;
   160→}
   161→export type UseButtonReturn = ButtonState & ButtonHandlers;
   162→```
   163→
   164→**index.ts (logic hook)**
   165→
   166→```ts
   167→import { useCallback, useState } from 'react';
   168→import type { ButtonProps, UseButtonReturn } from './Models';
   169→
   170→export function useButton(props: ButtonProps): UseButtonReturn {
   171→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);
   172→
   173→  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
   174→    setPressed(true);
   175→    props.onPress?.();
   176→    setTimeout(() => setPressed(false), 150);
   177→  }, [props.onPress]);
   178→
   179→  return {
   180→    pressed,
   181→    handlePress,
   182→  };
   183→}
   184→```
   185→
   186→**view.tsx (render)**
   187→
   188→```tsx
   189→import React from 'react';
   190→import { Pressable, View } from 'react-native';
   191→import { Text } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
   192→import { useButton } from './index';
   193→import type { ButtonProps } from './Models';
   194→
   195→export default function Button(props: ButtonProps) {
   196→  const { pressed, handlePress } = useButton(props);
   197→
   198→  return (
   199→    <Pressable disabled={props.disabled} onPress={handlePress}>
   200→      <View>
   201→        <Text>
   202→          {props.text}
   203→          {pressed ? ' •' : ''}
   204→        </Text>
   205→      </View>
   206→    </Pressable>
   207→  );
   208→}
   209→```
   210→
   211→---
   212→
   213→## Project Organization
   214→
   215→```
   216→src/
   217→├── @types/            # Global TS types
   218→├── assets/            # Images, fonts, icons
   219→├── atomic/            # UI components (Hook Component pattern)
   220→│   ├── atoms/
   221→│   ├── molecules/
   222→│   └── organisms/
   223→├── modules/           # Microfrontends shared and native modules
   224→├── screens/           # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
   225→├── services/          # Domain logic (SOLID layout)
   226→│   ├── api/           # HTTP layer (Axios/Fetch)
   227→│   ├── class/         # Class with logical requests
   228→│   ├── hooks/         # Specific service hooks
   229→│   ├── repository/    # Data abstraction & mapping
   230→│   ├── services/      # Business orchestration
   231→│   ├── storage/       # Storage orchestration with cache or not
   232→│   ├── store/         # Zustand slices (only)
   233→│   ├── models/        # Domain types & contracts
   234→│   ├── utils/         # Reusable service helps
   235→│   └── index.ts       # Public exports
   236→├── hooks/             # Cross-cutting React hooks
   237→├── routes/            # Navigation config
   238→├── settings/          # Env & global config (axios, etc.)
   239→└── utils/             # General-purpose helpers
   240→```
   241→
   242→> UI **never** calls API directly. All effects & side effects live in the **logic hooks** (which call `/services`).
   243→
   244→---
   245→
   246→## Services Architecture
   247→
   248→**Flow:** `UI → services → repository → api` and `UI → services → store (Zustand)`
   249→
   250→- **api/**: request clients; no domain logic.
   251→- **class/**: class with logical requests.
   252→- **hooks/**: specific service hooks.
   253→- **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.
   254→- **services/**: orchestration and business rules.
   255→- **storage/**: storage orchestration with cache or not.
   256→- **store/**: Zustand slices (single source of app state).
   257→- **models/**: types, DTOs, contracts.
   258→- **utils/**: reusable service helpers.
   259→
   260→Principles:
   261→
   262→- Single responsibility per folder/file.
   263→- No circular dependencies.
   264→- Public APIs exported via `services/index.ts` per domain.
   265→
   266→---
   267→
   268→## State Management (Zustand-only)
   269→
   270→- All global/shared state is **Zustand**.
   271→- Slices live under `/services/<domain>/store/`.
   272→- Use `persist` (with `createJSONStorage`) only when needed.
   273→- Keep setters pure; side effects go in hooks or services.
   274→
   275→**Slice example**
   276→
   277→```ts
   278→import type { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
   279→import type { AuthActions, AuthState } from '../models/store';
   280→
   281→export type AuthSlice = {
   282→  auth: AuthState;
   283→  authActions: AuthActions;
   284→};
   285→
   286→const initialAuth = {
   287→  user: null,
   288→  loading: false,
   289→  error: undefined,
   290→};
   291→
   292→export const createAuthSlice: StateCreator<
   293→  AuthSlice,
   294→  [],
   295→  [],
   296→  AuthSlice
   297→> = set => ({
   298→  auth: initialAuth,
   299→  authActions: {
   300→    setLoading: v =>
   301→      set(s => ({
   302→        auth: {
   303→          ...s.auth,
   304→          isLoading: v,
   305→        },
   306→      })),
   307→    setUser: v =>
   308→      set(s => ({
   309→        auth: {
   310→          ...s.auth,
   311→          user: v,
   312→        },
   313→      })),
   314→    setError: v =>
   315→      set(s => ({
   316→        auth: {
   317→          ...s.auth,
   318→          error: v,
   319→        },
   320→      })),
   321→    reset: () => set({ auth: initialAuth }),
   322→  },
   323→});
   324→```
   325→
   326→**Root Store**
   327→
   328→- Applies to ALL Sem Parar frontend apps — including SuperApp.
   329→
   330→```ts
   331→import { create } from 'zustand';
   332→import { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from 'zustand/middleware';
   333→import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
   334→
   335→import {
   336→  createUserSlice,
   337→  type UserSlice,
   338→} from '@semparar/mf-app-user/src/newArch/user';
   339→import { createAuthSlice, type AuthSlice } from '@semparar/mf-app-yourmf';
   340→
   341→import storage from '~/redux/store/storage';
   342→
   343→/** Add your slice Type */
   344→export type RootStore = UserSlice & AuthSlice;
   345→
   346→export const useRootStore = create<RootStore>()(
   347→  devtools(
   348→    persist(
   349→      immer((...a) => ({
   350→        ...createUserSlice(...a),
   351→        ...createAuthSlice(...a), // Add your slice here
   352→      })),
   353→      {
   354→        name: 'root-storage',
   355→        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
   356→        partialize: s => ({
   357→          user: s.user,
   358→          auth: s.auth, // Add your store data
   359→        }),
   360→        merge: (persisted, current) => ({
   361→          ...current,
   362→          ...(persisted as Partial<RootStore>),
   363→        }),
   364→      },
   365→    ),
   366→    { name: 'RootStore' },
   367→  ),
   368→);
   369→```
   370→
   371→- For Use on Class.
   372→
   373→```ts
   374→class Auth {
   375→  private readonly setAuth;
   376→
   377→  constructor () {
   378→    this.setUser = useRootStore.getState().authActions.setUser;
   379→  }
   380→
   381→  function doSomething(data) {
   382→    this.setUser({ ...data });
   383→  }
   384→}
   385→```
   386→
   387→- For Use on Component/Screen.
   388→- UI never imports the store directly — uses selectors
   389→
   390→```ts
   391→const loading = useRootStore(s => s.user.isLoading);
   392→const token = useRootStore(s => s.auth.token);
   393→```
   394→
   395→---
   396→
   397→## Routes Naming
   398→
   399→Standardize as **`Acronym + Route`**:
   400→
   401→- ✅ `SPPayment` (Sem Parar Payment)
   402→- ✅ `FTHPayment` (Fintech Payment)
   403→
   404→---
   405→
   406→## Folder Naming Rules
   407→
   408→| Folder                              | Convention   | Examples                   |
   409→| ----------------------------------- | ------------ | -------------------------- |
   410→| `atomic`, `screens`, `routes`       | `PascalCase` | `HomeScreen`, `CarDetails` |
   411→| `assets`, `hooks`, `services`, etc. | `camelCase`  | `useAuth`, `authService`   |
   412→
   413→---
   414→
   415→## Code Standards
   416→
   417→**Language**: English only.  
   418→**Naming**: `camelCase` (vars/functions), `PascalCase` (components/classes), `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (constants).
   419→
   420→**Explanatory variables**
   421→
   422→```js
   423→const onlyNumbersRegex = /^\d+$/;
   424→const getNumberValidation = message => value =>
   425→  !onlyNumbersRegex.test(value) && message;
   426→const isNumber = getNumberValidation('error message');
   427→isNumber(1);
   428→```
   429→
   430→**Semantic constants**
   431→
   432→```js
   433→const DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS = 86400000;
   434→setTimeout(doSomething, DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS);
   435→```
   436→
   437→**Library workarounds with link**
   438→
   439→```js
   440→// Refer to issue https://github.com/ngokevin/react-file-reader-input/issues/11#issuecomment-363484861
   441→// eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
   442→event.target.value = '';
   443→```
   444→
   445→**JSDoc**
   446→
   447→```js
   448→/**
   449→ * Truncates an event name to the max length.
   450→ * @param {*} eventName
   451→ * @param {*} maxLength
   452→ */
   453→```
   454→
   455→**Hooks: multi-line deps & IIFE**
   456→
   457→```ts
   458→useEffect(() => {
   459→  (async () => {
   460→    await CustomMath.randomSum();
   461→    setSum(42);
   462→  })();
   463→}, [setSum]);
   464→```
   465→
   466→**Extract conditions**
   467→
   468→```ts
   469→const hasSelectedOffer = !!(selectedProduct || selectedLeasingOffer);
   470→if (!hasSelectedOffer && !individualOffer) return;
   471→```
   472→
   473→**Optional chaining**
   474→
   475→```ts
   476→const answers = formikForm?.values?.answers;
   477→```
   478→
   479→**JSX indentation**
   480→
   481→```tsx
   482→{
   483→  !isEnd && <Button text="CTA" onPress={handleNavigate} />;
   484→}
   485→```
   486→
   487→**Early returns**
   488→
   489→```ts
   490→if (!data) return null;
   491→return <View />;
   492→```
   493→
   494→**Nullish coalescing**
   495→
   496→```ts
   497→return data ?? 0;
   498→```
   499→
   500→---
   501→
   502→## Styles Patterns
   503→
   504→- Do **not** use `StyleSheet` or `styled-components`.
   505→- Use **@semparar/design-system-app** for components, tokens, and theming.
   506→
   507→---
   508→
   509→## Cache Pattern
   510→
   511→Keep cache typed, serializable, and domain.
   512→
   513→```ts
   514→import storage from '~/redux/store/storage';
   515→
   516→export interface CachedData<T> {
   517→  timestamp: number;
   518→  data: T;
   519→}
   520→
   521→export interface StorageContract<T> {
   522→  get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null>;
   523→  save(data: T): Promise<void>;
   524→  remove(): Promise<void>;
   525→}
   526→
   527→export class GenericStorage<T> implements StorageContract<T> {
   528→  constructor(private readonly key: string) {}
   529→
   530→  async get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null> {
   531→    const json = await storage.getItem(this.key);
   532→    if (!json) return null;
   533→    return JSON.parse(json) as CachedData<T>;
   534→  }
   535→
   536→  async save(data: T): Promise<void> {
   537→    const payload: CachedData<T> = {
   538→      timestamp: Date.now(),
   539→      data,
   540→    };
   541→    await storage.setItem(this.key, JSON.stringify(payload));
   542→  }
   543→
   544→  async remove(): Promise<void> {
   545→    await storage.removeItem(this.key);
   546→  }
   547→}
   548→```
   549→
   550→**Guidelines**
   551→
   552→- One storage class per module/feature.
   553→- Types/interfaces live in `Models/` where appropriate.
   554→- Use `timestamp` for freshness/expiry strategies.
   555→- Never persist secrets/PII outside secure storage.
   556→- Keep payloads small and JSON-serializable.
   557→
   558→---
   559→
   560→## Checklist
   561→
   562→- [ ] Screens/Components follow **Hook Component pattern** (`index.ts` hook + `view.tsx` render)
   563→- [ ] Types live in **Models/**
   564→- [ ] Only **Zustand** for global/shared state under **/services/<domain>/store/**
   565→- [ ] UI never calls API directly (go through **/services**)
   566→- [ ] Code standards and styles patterns applied
   567→- [ ] Cache implemented via **GenericStorage** (when needed)
   568→- [ ] Routes and folder naming conventions followed
   569→
   570→---
   571→
   572→Happy shipping! 🚀
   573→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.text: Now let me also examine some existing screens to understand the established patterns in this codebase.

content.content:
1→import {
     2→  BackDropBottom,
     3→  Box,
     4→  Button,
     5→  CardActivity,
     6→  DetailTransactionValue,
     7→  SeparatorHorizontal,
     8→  TagLabel,
     9→  Text,
    10→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    11→import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
    12→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    13→import { Linking } from 'react-native';
    14→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
    15→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    16→import { moment } from '../../services/moment';
    17→import { formatToCurrency } from '../../utils/functions';
    18→import { PointsDetailProps } from './Models';
    19→import {
    20→  getDetailScreenTitle,
    21→  getFormattedHighlightText,
    22→  getFormattedPointsValue,
    23→  getOrigin,
    24→  getPurchaseTypeLabel,
    25→  getTagSubType,
    26→  getTransactionGainType,
    27→  getVehicleInfo,
    28→} from './utils';
    29→
    30→const PointsDetailView: FC<PointsDetailProps> = ({
    31→  handleGoBack,
    32→  transaction,
    33→  modalizeRef,
    34→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    35→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    36→}) => {
    37→  const gainType = getTransactionGainType(transaction);
    38→  const tagSubType = getTagSubType(transaction);
    39→  const screenTitle = getDetailScreenTitle(gainType, transaction.type);
    40→  const vehicleInfo = getVehicleInfo(transaction);
    41→  const purchaseTypeLabel = getPurchaseTypeLabel(tagSubType);
    42→  const origin = getOrigin(transaction);
    43→  const formattedCurrencyValue = formatToCurrency(transaction.currencyValue);
    44→  const formattedPointsValue = getFormattedPointsValue(
    45→    transaction.amount,
    46→    transaction.type,
    47→  );
    48→  const cardTitle = transaction.description || '';
    49→  const highlightText = getFormattedHighlightText(
    50→    transaction.date,
    51→    gainType,
    52→    moment,
    53→  );
    54→
    55→  const renderDivider = () => {
    56→    return (
    57→      <SeparatorHorizontal
    58→        borderWidth="smaller"
    59→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    60→        height={1}
    61→        width="100%"
    62→        mt="xxxxs"
    63→      />
    64→    );
    65→  };
    66→
    67→  const renderTagContent = () => {
    68→    const hasVehicleInfo = !!vehicleInfo && vehicleInfo !== '';
    69→    const shouldShowOrigin = origin && !hasVehicleInfo;
    70→    const hasPurchaseTypeLabel =
    71→      !!purchaseTypeLabel && purchaseTypeLabel !== '';
    72→
    73→    return (
    74→      <>
    75→        {renderDivider()}
    76→        {shouldShowOrigin && (
    77→          <>
    78→            <Text
    79→              type="paragraphXL"
    80→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    81→              mb="xxxxs"
    82→              mt="xxxxs"
    83→            >
    84→              Origem
    85→            </Text>
    86→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    87→              {origin}
    88→            </Text>
    89→            {renderDivider()}
    90→          </>
    91→        )}
    92→        {hasVehicleInfo && (
    93→          <>
    94→            <Text
    95→              type="paragraphXL"
    96→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    97→              mb="xxxxs"
    98→              mt="xxxxs"
    99→            >
   100→              Tag
   101→            </Text>
   102→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   103→              {vehicleInfo}
   104→            </Text>
   105→            {renderDivider()}
   106→          </>
   107→        )}
   108→
   109→        {hasPurchaseTypeLabel && (
   110→          <>
   111→            <Text
   112→              type="paragraphXL"
   113→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   114→              mb="xxxxs"
   115→              mt="xxxxs"
   116→            >
   117→              Tipo de compra
   118→            </Text>
   119→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   120→              {purchaseTypeLabel}
   121→            </Text>
   122→          </>
   123→        )}
   124→      </>
   125→    );
   126→  };
   127→
   128→  return (
   129→    <>
   130→      <BasicScreen
   131→        title={screenTitle}
   132→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   133→        hasScroll
   134→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
   135→      >
   136→        <DetailTransactionValue
   137→          icon={transaction.icon as never}
   138→          title={cardTitle}
   139→          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   140→          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   141→          points={formattedPointsValue}
   142→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   143→          pointsColor={
   144→            transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED'
   145→              ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02'
   146→              : ('INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const)
   147→          }
   148→        />
   149→
   150→        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="xxxxs" flex={1}>
   151→          <TagLabel
   152→            icon={undefined}
   153→            type="neutral"
   154→            text={highlightText}
   155→            showSpacing
   156→          />
   157→
   158→          <Box mt="xxxs" flex={1} width="100%">
   159→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   160→              Valor
   161→            </Text>
   162→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   163→              {formattedCurrencyValue}
   164→            </Text>
   165→
   166→            {gainType === 'TAG' && renderTagContent()}
   167→          </Box>
   168→
   169→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   170→            <Button
   171→              type="secundaryLarge"
   172→              text="Relatar Problema"
   173→              onPress={handleOpenReportProblem}
   174→            />
   175→          </Box>
   176→        </Box>
   177→      </BasicScreen>
   178→
   179→      <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
   180→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
   181→          <Box align="center" width="100%">
   182→            <Text
   183→              type="paragraphXXXL"
   184→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   185→              mb="xs"
   186→              align="center"
   187→            >
   188→              Central de Atendimento
   189→            </Text>
   190→          </Box>
   191→        </Box>
   192→
   193→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   194→          <CardActivity
   195→            mt="nano"
   196→            icon="icon-contact"
   197→            title="Capitais"
   198→            description="4002 1552"
   199→            iconRight="icon-next"
   200→            showIcon
   201→            showTagLabel={false}
   202→            onPress={() => {
   203→              eventSelectContent({
   204→                content_type: 'cta',
   205→                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
   206→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   207→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   208→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   209→              });
   210→              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
   211→            }}
   212→          />
   213→
   214→          <CardActivity
   215→            mt="nano"
   216→            icon="icon-contact"
   217→            title="Demais localidades"
   218→            description="0800 015 0252"
   219→            iconRight="icon-next"
   220→            showIcon
   221→            showTagLabel={false}
   222→            onPress={() => {
   223→              eventSelectContent({
   224→                content_type: 'cta',
   225→                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
   226→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   227→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   228→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   229→              });
   230→
   231→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   232→            }}
   233→          />
   234→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxxxs">
   235→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das
   236→            9h às 17h.
   237→          </Text>
   238→        </Box>
   239→
   240→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxxxs">
   241→          <Text
   242→            type="linkMD"
   243→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   244→            onPress={handleCloseReportProblem}
   245→            align="center"
   246→          >
   247→            Fechar
   248→          </Text>
   249→        </Box>
   250→      </BackDropBottom>
   251→    </>
   252→  );
   253→};
   254→
   255→export default PointsDetailView;
   256→
